name: install conflict detection still reports a real conflict when one is present
command:
fn=$(sed -n '/^detect_conflicts() {/,/^}/p' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/install.sh")
d=$(mktemp -d); touch "$d/.cursorrules"
out=$(bash -uc "$fn"$'\n'"detect_conflicts \"$d\"" 2>&1)
rm -rf "$d"
echo "$out" | grep -q "another source" && echo conflict-reported 1>&2
